text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after training, Hishi Akebono visits me
in my office.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hi there, Trainer! Are you busy right now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Today's Valentine's Day, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Well, I have a super buono present just for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's ready now, so come with me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her until we end up at the cafeteria, which
smells heavenly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With a flourish, Hishi Akebono steps back...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And reveals a chocolate cake of epic proportions!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to think of a way to show you my
gratitude, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And I realized the best way to do it was to put my
feelings into physical form!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So I poured all my feelings of gratitude into the
cake while I was baking it, and it turned out
super-duper big!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But that's okay, because bigger is better!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here you go, enjoy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She serves me a slice, and I take a bite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate cake is so delicious I almost feel as
if I've been physically struck when I have my first
mouthful.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yay! That's good to hear. Actually, I went a
little easy on the sweetness.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I did something special to every layer of sponge,
too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The top layer has cookies in it, the second one is
filled with walnuts and peanuts, and the bottom
layer is a fruit-fest!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I wanted you to enjoy every last bite, without
ever getting tired of the taste!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Nothing would make me happier than if you ate
to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was afraid this cake was too big at first, but
since it's packed full of big feelings, I really want
to make sure I finish the whole thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lose myself in the cake for a while, but then I
start thinking about what my next few weeks will
look like with all this chocolate cake...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the cake will freeze well, so you don't have to
worry about finishing it all at once! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I end up having a memorably pleasant
day with Hishi Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And reveals an earthenware pot full of bubbling
chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I made you chocolate chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I say "chanko," but there won't be any
veggies in there! I only prepared fruits, so you can
relax!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I didn't put them in yet because I didn't want the
fruit to overcook, so I'll just add them now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono starts carefully cooking tons of
beautifully cut fruit in the pot.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
There, all done! ☆ There's a lot left, so eat as
much as you like!
choice_data_list: Thanks! I can't wait to try it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She serves me a bowl of fruit and I waste no time
taking a sip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate chanko is so buono I almost feel as
if I've been physically struck when I have my first
mouthful.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Yay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You know, at first I was just going to make you
regular chocolate, but it didn't feel quite right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're a really special person to me, so I wanted
to make you something really special.
choice_data_list: And that's how you decided on chanko?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's right! But actually, the chanko isn't
complete yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the pot before me, I'm not sure what
else she could possibly add.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Did you know? Chanko is tastiest when you
eat it with other people.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sharing the experience makes you feel all warm
and fuzzy and ready to work hard again!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Um... would it be all right if I joined you, so we
can eat it together?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Okay! Let's work hard together, Trainer!
Woo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We indulge in the chocolate chanko together as
we chat about all that's happened, as well as what
we're going to do in the future.
